results.title: Deploy Voice AI Agents in Minutes, Not Months | Bolna (YC F25) posted on the topic | LinkedIn
results.content:
13,839 followers

For most enterprises, Voice AI agents take weeks to be designed and months to be deployed.
And that takes away the whole point of scaling up with AI. We've seen this up close for months now as our FDEs extended support to our enterprise clients extensively covering various use cases across sectors including BFSI, Recruitment, E-Commerce and more.
It took us thousands of hours of understanding and iterations along with auditing millions of Voice AI calls to figure out what works. What's here is a product that should just take you 10 minutes for an end-to-end voice AI agent ready for deployment.
Now live for Beta on Bolna! Link in comments.
Prateek Maitreya Siddharth Nainsi Stuti Vaibhav
#VoiceAI #AIAgent #AgentStudio #Prompt

## More Relevant Posts

View organization page for Exato.ai

6,624 followers [...] When an AI agent gets something wrong on a customer call, the organisation is still the one that has to answer for it.
That might sound obvious. But the way many enterprises are deploying AI suggests they haven't fully reckoned with it. Whoever owns the customer relationship owns the outcome.
This has real implications for how AI should be built into CX operations:
🔍 Every AI decision that affects a customer needs to be auditable, with a clear record of what happened and why
🏛️ Governance frameworks need to be designed into the system from the start, not retrofitted after something goes wrong
📋 Compliance requirements vary by jurisdiction across APAC, and the AI stack needs to reflect that
🤝 Human oversight isn't a fallback for when AI fails. It's a core part of responsible AI deployment

## Very disappointing experience with…
Very disappointing experience with Bolna. Been trying to reach them for months regarding a refund, but there has been absolutely no response. There is no visible customer support channel, no working contact number, and emails go unanswered. It feels like once they have your payment, communication completely stops. If you’re considering using their services, be aware that getting support or resolving billing issues may be impossible. Very frustrating experience overall.

Based on 2 reviews [...] Hi all! I’m Maitreya, co-founder of Bolna with @xan\_ps . Excited to launch our no-code platform that enables you to build super intelligent Front Desk Voice AI agents within 5 minutes📞 If you are missing calls from your customers and clients, or if you want to engage your leads with a calling campaign, Bolna is definitely for you! What makes Bolna unique? 1. Forget IVR, Pre-Recorded message and Robo-callers. Agents built on Bolna behave the way humans would, listening to the user, using their knowledge to build a response, and responding in a natural way 🙋🏻‍♂️ 2. Creating agents has never been easier. Using our templates or our custom GPT (Link), you can create an agent perfect for your use case. With RAG, Function Calling and CRM Integrations, our agent perfectly understands your [...] Report

Bolna's voice AI literally called me and ran a full phone interview. I wasn’t sure what to expect, but the experience was super smooth. It asked thoughtful questions, handled pauses like a real person, and the tone didn’t feel robotic at all. It actually felt like I was talking to a recruiter. What I loved most? No long wait times. I got feedback and next steps right after the call. So efficient. Shoutout to the team behind Bolna — this tech is going to change the game for hiring

Businesses are unable to answer their volume of inbound calls. Bolna provides businesses with an intelligent human-like 24 hours available AI Front Desk Agent. Currently, businesses can use Bolna Voice AI to answer and resolve every call, in every language, for every use case, throughout the day. Merchants can buy their own dedicated phone number and assign an agent to it with rich integrations with order data, calendar, email etc. for workflow automation.   more
